note: Explorer: hashrate dual-metric. Was bitsQ/blocktime (dimensionally meaningless). Now PRIMARY = 2^bits_real/blocktime (Bitcoin-style, ~189 H/s, stable across profiles, comparable with other PoW chains). SECONDARY = 2^bits_real/(filter/100)/blocktime (effective attempts/sec, ~3.8K att/s in H11, varies with profile, reflects ConvergenceX filter workload). Both shown on EST. HASHRATE card and Unique Miners panel. Per-miner hashrate uses primary. cASERT consensus unchanged.
